tagline: Senior enterprise architecture for complex systems.

heroDescription: IT Ant ehf is the practice of Anton Sigurjónsson, a senior enterprise systems architect with many years of experience designing dependable architecture for complex systems. You work directly with the architect, end to end.

lineage.intro: We build our own products, too.
lineage.body: Alongside the architecture practice, the same hands ship real software through G9, a product house — and CertainGuard, a product for dependable certificate and security lifecycle management.
